author: Ivan Verbovoy
name: Progressive Depth + Hedge Mixer (3x4 depth recurrence, 5-expert online ensemble)
blurb: 3 shared blocks x 4 repeats (12 effective layers) with progressive depth scheduling (2→3→4 repeats), XSA, LeakyReLU², Cross-Repeat Skip, SWA, int8+zstd22. Eval: 5-expert Hedge Mixer (neural + unigram + bigram + trigram + entropy) with online multiplicative weight updates. Mean over 3 seeds.
